summary: TeeEvidencePolicy the E1 device ships for the desktop+local-agent topology: the agent runtime runs in the on-device CoVE TVM (same as local), with UI rendering and transport outside the domain over the shared-page virtio path. Private inference still binds the chip NPU confidential-I/O lane (npuProtected + npuFirmware). Distinct from local only in its containerized agent surface: the agent/compose measurement must additionally be gated because a desktop deployment ships the agent as a measured container. Consumed by evaluateTeeEvidencePolicy (tee-policy.ts).
